tools.name: audit_website
tools.description: Score a website 0-100 across SSL, mobile-readiness, speed, contact, booking.

tools.name: search_businesses
tools.description: Find local businesses by niche + city. Yelp-backed; OSM fallback if Yelp not configured.

tools.name: get_business_details
tools.description: Resolve a single business to phone, address, website, hours, rating.

tools.name: bulk_audit
tools.description: Audit up to 20 URLs concurrently. Results sorted worst-first (best leads first).

tools.name: score_lead
tools.description: Composite 0-100 lead score combining audit + demand signal.

tools.name: find_no_website
tools.description: Find businesses in a niche with NO website at all — hottest cold-outreach leads.

tools.name: find_no_booking
tools.description: Businesses with a website but no online booking system. Big opportunity for SaaS pitches.

tools.name: get_tech_stack
tools.description: CMS, booking platform, email provider, analytics detected on a target URL.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_tech_stack · Private data: audit_website · Public sink: get_tech_stack.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_tech_stack · Private data: audit_website · Public sink: get_tech_stack

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
